errors.loadOrgMfa: Failed to load organization MFA settings.
errors.orgMfaForbiddenView: You do not have permission to view organization MFA settings.
errors.orgMfaForbiddenChange: You do not have permission to change organization MFA settings.
errors.updateOrgMfa: Failed to update organization MFA settings.

profile.title: Account & profile
profile.subtitle: Manage your identity, display name and sign-in credentials.
profile.nameRequired: Both first and last name are required.
profile.avatarUnsupported: Changing your avatar is not yet supported.
profile.usernameHint: Used to sign in; cannot be changed

appearance.title: Appearance & language
appearance.subtitle: Tune the interface appearance, language and local security behavior. These preferences are saved on this device only.

language.label: Interface language
language.hint: Switch the display language of the whole interface.

theme.label: Theme
theme.hint: Choose a light or dark appearance.

density.label: Density
density.hint: Switch between a roomier or a more compact layout.

idle.label: Auto-lock
idle.hint: Automatically lock the vault after a period of inactivity.

reveal.label: Reveal duration
reveal.hint: After a password is shown, re-hide it automatically once this time elapses.

burn.label: Clipboard clear delay
burn.hint: After copying a password, best-effort clear the clipboard once this time elapses.

security.title: Security / two-factor
security.subtitle: Add a verification layer to the sign-in path. MFA is checked on the server and does not affect end-to-end encryption.
security.rateLimited: Too many attempts. Please try again later.
security.orgDisabled: Two-factor authentication is not yet enabled at the organization level. Ask an admin to turn on "Organization-wide TOTP" under the "Server & organization" tab first, then come back here to set it up.

card.title: Authenticator app (TOTP)
card.intro: At sign-in, use a one-time code from an authenticator app (Google Authenticator, Authy, 1Password, etc.) as a second factor.

setup.noProvisioningUri: The server did not return a provisioning URI.
setup.invalidCode: Enter the 6-digit code generated by your authenticator app.
setup.verifyFailed: Code verification failed. Check your authenticator app and try again.
setup.scanStep: Scan the QR code with Google Authenticator, 1Password or Authy.
setup.codeStep: Enter the 6-digit code to finish setup.

confirmDisable.title: Turn off two-factor?
confirmDisable.message: After this, signing in will no longer require a one-time code. You can re-enable it any time.

qr.unavailable: Can't generate a QR code — paste the key below into your authenticator manually.

account.title: Server & organization
account.subtitle: Your encryption key fingerprint, server info and sign-in credentials.

gpg.title: OpenPGP key fingerprint
gpg.intro: This OpenPGP key does all encryption and decryption inside your browser. You can share the fingerprint with others to verify your identity; your private key and passphrase never leave this device and are never visible to the server.
gpg.locked: The key is locked — unlock the vault first to view the fingerprint.

server.title: Server info
server.readonly: Read-only info returned by the JPassbolt API.
server.empty: The server did not return any configuration info.

orgMfa.title: Organization two-factor (admin)
orgMfa.hintOn: Every user in this organization may enable TOTP.

logout.label: Sign out
logout.hint: Clear the local session and return to the sign-in page

metadata.title: Encrypted metadata
metadata.subtitle: Organization policy and keys used to encrypt (v5) resource metadata.
metadata.loadFailed: Failed to load encrypted metadata settings.

typesPolicy.title: Metadata format policy
typesPolicy.subtitle: Control the format used for new items, and whether v4/v5 creation and migration are allowed organization-wide.
typesPolicy.noActiveKeyWarn: There is currently no active organization metadata key. Enabling any v5 option requires an active metadata key — until one is created, the server will reject these changes.
typesPolicy.blockedNoKey: Enabling v5 requires an active organization metadata key. Please create a metadata key first.
typesPolicy.updateFailed: Failed to update metadata format policy.

keysSettings.title: Metadata key settings
keysSettings.subtitle: Manage how the metadata key is used and shared across the organization.
keysSettings.allowPersonalKeysHelp: Allow metadata of personal items to be encrypted with the user's own GPG key (user_key).
keysSettings.zeroKnowledgeHelp: Share the metadata key while the server never holds the private part of it.
keysSettings.updateFailed: Failed to update metadata key settings.

orgKeys.title: Organization metadata keys
orgKeys.subtitle: Shared keys used to encrypt resource metadata. Distribution shows how many users hold an encrypted copy of each key's private part. Creating and rotating keys is not supported here yet.
orgKeys.emptyDescription: No organization metadata key has been created yet. Until one exists, v5 encrypted metadata stays disabled.

orgPolicies.title: Organization policies (admin)
orgPolicies.subtitle: Organization-wide email notification and password generation policies. Visible to administrators only.

emails.title: Email notifications
emails.subtitle: Control which transactional emails the server sends and how much content they include. Changes are saved instantly.
emails.saveFailed: Failed to save email notification settings.

toggles.send_password_create: Notify when a password is created
toggles.send_password_update: Notify when a password is updated
toggles.send_password_delete: Notify when a password is deleted
toggles.send_password_share: Notify when a password is shared
toggles.send_comment_add: Notify when a comment is added
toggles.send_comment_update: Notify when a comment is updated
toggles.send_comment_delete: Notify when a comment is deleted
toggles.send_folder_create: Notify when a folder is created
toggles.send_folder_update: Notify when a folder is updated
toggles.send_folder_delete: Notify when a folder is deleted
toggles.send_folder_share: Notify when a folder is shared
toggles.send_group_delete: Notify when a group is deleted
toggles.send_group_user_add: Notify when a member is added to a group
toggles.send_group_user_delete: Notify when a member is removed from a group
toggles.send_group_user_update: Notify when a group member changes
toggles.send_group_manager_update: Notify when a group manager changes
toggles.send_user_create: Notify when a user is created
toggles.send_user_recover: Notify when a user starts account recovery
toggles.send_admin_user_setup_completed: Notify admins when a user completes setup
toggles.send_admin_user_recover_complete: Notify admins when a user completes recovery

password.title: Password policy
password.subtitle: Organization-wide password and passphrase generation policy. Read-only in the community edition.
password.readonly: Read-only policy returned by the JPassbolt API.
